root.sql:
select sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as mem_name , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_sharestock(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as share_stock
, coalesce(( select salary_amount from sc_mem_m_member_work_info where 1=1 and membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ),0) as salary_amount
, coalesce(( select academic_salary from sc_mem_m_member_work_info where 1=1 and membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ),0) as academic_salary
, coalesce(( select remuneration_amount from sc_mem_m_member_work_info where 1=1 and membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ),0) as remuneration_amount
, coalesce(( select salary_real from sc_mem_m_member_work_info where 1=1 and membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ),0) as salary_real
-- ที่อยู่ปัจจุบัน , (CASE PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,('0')::text, '6' ) WHEN '-' THEN '' ELSE PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,('0')::text, '6' ) END) AS address_pres_address_no , (CASE PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,('0')::text, '8' ) WHEN '-' THEN '' ELSE PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,('0')::text, '8' ) END) AS address_pres_moo , (CASE PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,('0')::text, '7' ) WHEN '-' THEN '' ELSE PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,('0')::text, '7' ) END) AS address_pres_mooban , (CASE PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,('0')::text, '9' ) WHEN '-' THEN '' ELSE PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,('0')::text, '9' ) END) AS address_pres_road , (CASE PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,('0')::text, '10' ) WHEN '-' THEN '' ELSE PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,('0')::text, '10' ) END) AS address_pres_soi , (CASE PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,('0')::text, '11' ) WHEN '-' THEN '' ELSE PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,('0')::text, '11' ) END) AS address_pres_tambol , (CASE PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,('0')::text, '12' ) WHEN '-' THEN '' ELSE PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,('0')::text, '12' ) END) AS address_pres_district , (CASE PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,('0')::text, '13' ) WHEN '-' THEN '' ELSE PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,('0')::text, '13' ) END) AS address_pres_province , (CASE PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,('0')::text, '14' ) WHEN '-' THEN '' ELSE PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,('0')::text, '14' ) END) AS address_pres_post , (CASE PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,('0')::text, '15' ) WHEN '-' THEN '' ELSE PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,('0')::text, '15' ) END) AS address_pres_telephone
, (CASE sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code WHEN '0' THEN 'เป็นสมาชิก' ELSE 'พ้นสภาพ' END) as member_status_code , pka_com_function.fp_get_loan_balance_by_mem(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as loan_balance_mem from sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group
where 1=1 and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '0' or sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no in ( select membership_no from sc_lon_m_loan_card where principal_balance > 0 ) )
/*WHERE*/
order by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no
